events.title: US War in Iran Cost Nears $29 Billion
events.desc: The Pentagon has announced that the cost of the ongoing war with Iran has reached approximately $29 billion. This figure represents an increase of $4 billion from previous estimates and includes updated costs for equipment repair and replacement, as well as operational expenses.

events.title: Iran Expands Definition of Strait of Hormuz Operational Area
events.desc: A senior IRGC Navy officer stated that Iran has significantly expanded its definition of the Strait of Hormuz into a 'vast operational area.' This redefinition enlarges the strategic military significance and scope of the strait far beyond its previous narrow boundaries.

events.title: Drone War in Southern Lebanon Complicates Iran Peace Prospects
events.desc: While peace negotiations between Washington and Tehran continue, a stepped-up drone war between Hezbollah and Israel in southern Lebanon is complicating efforts to de-escalate regional tensions and achieve a lasting peace.

events.title: Explosion Kills Nine in Pakistan Market
events.desc: A large explosion at a crowded market in Sarai Naurang, northwestern Pakistan, resulted in the deaths of at least nine people and injured approximately 30 others. The blast has raised concerns about renewed conflict in the region.

events.title: Kuwait Unveils IRGC Infiltration Plot, Arrests Four
events.desc: Kuwaiti authorities have arrested four individuals accused of belonging to Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and planning attacks within Kuwait. The suspects were apprehended attempting to enter the country illegally by sea.

events.title: Israel Approves Law Allowing Death Penalty for October 7 Detainees
events.desc: Israel has passed a law that permits the implementation of the death penalty and public trials for individuals linked to the October 7 attacks.

events.title: UNICEF Reports 70 Children Killed in West Bank and East Jerusalem Since 2025
events.desc: The UN children's agency (UNICEF) reported that 70 children have been killed in the occupied Palestinian territories (excluding Gaza) since the beginning of 2025, averaging one child per week. Over 800 children have been injured during the same period, with many succumbing to live ammunition, while others were casualties of stabbing, beatings, or pepper spray.

events.title: Israel Deports Activists Detained on Gaza Flotilla
events.desc: Israel has deported two activists, a Spanish national and a Brazilian national, who were detained after participating in a Gaza-bound aid flotilla. The incident highlights ongoing tensions surrounding maritime access to Gaza.

events.title: Lebanon Reports 39 Killed in Israeli Strikes
events.desc: Lebanon has reported that 39 people were killed in recent Israeli strikes, underscoring the continued exchange of fire between Israel and Hezbollah despite a previously announced ceasefire.

events.title: Hamas Disarmament Talks Stall, Raising Fears of Renewed Gaza War
events.desc: Reports indicate that stalled talks with Hamas regarding disarmament have prompted Israel to prepare for a potential resumption of fighting in Gaza.

events.title: Clandestine Network Smuggling Starlink Tech into Iran
events.desc: An individual is reportedly smuggling Starlink satellite internet terminals into Iran to circumvent internet blackouts and provide access to information. This operation aims to counter state-controlled information flow during the conflict.

events.title: Russia and China's Lawfare in the Arctic
events.desc: Russia and China are increasingly employing 'lawfare' tactics in the Arctic, including expansive maritime regulations and challenges to Western continental shelf claims, aiming to assert influence and contest resource access and freedom of navigation in the region.

events.title: Ankara's Crossroads: Rearmament and Prospect of War with Israel
events.desc: Tensions between Israel and Turkey are rising due to regional security issues concerning Syria and the Palestinian territories, with warnings of a potential conflict fueled by historical grievances and current geopolitical dynamics.

events.title: Adversaries Integrate, U.S. Partners Bypass Washington
events.desc: Iranian drone technology, refined by Russia through battlefield testing in Ukraine, is being used against Gulf Arab states. This development has placed the US in an unfamiliar position, requiring it to seek counter-drone assistance from Ukraine.

events.title: Russia's "Hormuz Playbook" in Baltic and Black Seas
events.desc: Russia may employ tactics similar to those used to disrupt maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, impacting trade and insurance markets in the Baltic and Black Seas through drone strikes and other measures.

events.title: UNICEF: 70 Children Killed in West Bank and East Jerusalem Since 2025
events.desc: Seventy children have been killed in the occupied Palestinian territories outside of Gaza since early 2025, with over 800 injured. Most fatalities involved live ammunition, but other causes included stabbing, beatings, and pepper spray.
